final_response: Got it — logged the pattern (Feb, March, now May; 3–4 days each time, eating the first week). Want me to draft a note to IT or your manager with the dates and impact, or hold it as a personal tracker for now?
actions: Staged blank workspace via bench/runner.py stage
Wrote contractor-access-lag.md capturing the three-incident pattern, open questions, and graduated next-step options
notes: User framed this as flagging-so-we-don't-lose-track, not a request for escalation. Treated it as a tracking/pattern-capture task, not a ticket-filing task.
Three occurrences across ~4 months is a real signal but not yet a formal complaint — offered a graduated set of next steps in the note rather than picking one unilaterally.

Asked one clarifying question in the reply (route to IT/manager vs. keep as personal tracker) since the right next step depends on the user's relationship to the process and how visible they want to be.
Did not invoke Linear/Slack/P2 — this is the personal workspace per CLAUDE.md boundaries, and the prompt is also generic (no Automattic context). Kept everything local to the staged workspace.
